name: verify_request_create
description: Start a phone number verification using Verify v2 API. Sends a one-time code to the user via a configurable workflow of channels (SMS, WhatsApp, voice, email). Returns a request_id used to check the code.

parameters.name: brand
parameters.description: The brand name displayed in the verification message (max 16 characters).

parameters.name: workflow
parameters.description: Array of workflow steps defining the channels to use. Each step has 'channel' (sms, whatsapp, voice, email) and 'to' (recipient).

parameters.name: code_length
parameters.description: Length of the verification code (4-10 digits). Default is 4.

parameters.name: channel_timeout
parameters.description: Timeout in seconds before moving to the next workflow step (60-900). Default is 300.
